---
title: "Learning the natural history of human disease with generative transformers"
author: 
- Shmatko
- Jung
- Gaurav
- et al.
publication: "Nature, **647**, 248–256 (2025)"
categories: 
  - external-publication
  - artificial-intelligence
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41586-025-09529-3
url_preprint: 
journ: "Nature"
issue: 647
page: 248–256
year: 2025
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 10.1038/s41586-025-09529-3
---
